components.name: json
components.description: JSON is a light-weight, language independent, data interchange format. See http://www.JSON.org/ The files in this package implement JSON encoders/decoders in Java. It also includes the capability to convert between JSON and XML, HTTP headers, Cookies, and CDL. This is a reference implementation. There are a large number of JSON packages in Java. Perhaps someday the Java community will standardize on one. Until then, choose carefully.

components.description: The Apache Software Foundation provides support for the Apache community of open-source software projects. The Apache projects are characterized by a collaborative, consensus based development process, an open and pragmatic software license, and a desire to create high quality software that leads the way in its field. We consider ourselves not simply a group of projects sharing a server, but rather a community of developers and users.

components.name: prometheus-remote-writer-docs
components.description: Single-page operator documentation rendered from AsciiDoc sources via asciidoctor-maven-plugin. Produces target/generated-docs/index.html; no installable artifact. Invoked by `make docs` and the publish-docs GitHub Actions workflow — never on the inner-loop `make build` path.
